mapper.sql: select distinct o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_type, o.source_biz_type, o.source_biz_id, o.source_biz_no, o.order_status, o.biz_date, o.apply_user_id, apply_user.nick_name as apply_user_name, o.apply_dept_id, apply_dept.dept_name as apply_dept_name, o.approve_user_id, approve_user.nick_name as approve_user_name, o.approve_time, o.approve_result, o.from_dept_id, from_dept.dept_name as from_dept_name, o.to_dept_id, to_dept.dept_name as to_dept_name, o.from_user_id, from_user.nick_name as from_user_name, o.to_user_id, to_user.nick_name as to_user_name, o.from_location_id, from_location.location_name as from_location_name, o.to_location_id, to_location.location_name as to_location_name, o.expected_return_date, o.disposal_reason, o.disposal_amount, o.attachment_count, o.status, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark from asset_operate_order o left join sys_user apply_user on apply_user.user_id = o.apply_user_id left join sys_user approve_user on approve_user.user_id = o.approve_user_id left join sys_user from_user on from_user.user_id = o.from_user_id left join sys_user to_user on to_user.user_id = o.to_user_id left join sys_dept apply_dept on apply_dept.dept_id = o.apply_dept_id left join sys_dept from_dept on from_dept.dept_id = o.from_dept_id left join sys_dept to_dept on to_dept.dept_id = o.to_dept_id left join asset_location from_location on from_location.location_id = o.from_location_id left join asset_location to_location on to_location.location_id = o.to_location_id left join ( select distinct order_id, dept_id from ( select order_id, apply_dept_id as dept_id from asset_operate_order where del_flag = '0' and apply_dept_id is not null union all select order_id, from_dept_id as dept_id from asset_operate_order where del_flag = '0' and from_dept_id is not null union all select order_id, to_dept_id as dept_id from asset_operate_order where del_flag = '0' and to_dept_id is not null ) order_scope_union ) scope_dept on scope_dept.order_id = o.order_id
mapper.select: select i.item_id, i.order_id, i.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, i.before_status, i.after_status, i.before_user_id, i.after_user_id, before_user.nick_name as before_user_name, after_user.nick_name as after_user_name, i.before_dept_id, i.after_dept_id, before_dept.dept_name as before_dept_name, after_dept.dept_name as after_dept_name, i.before_location_id, i.after_location_id, before_location.location_name as before_location_name, after_location.location_name as after_location_name, i.item_status, i.item_result from asset_operate_order_item i left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = i.asset_id left join sys_user before_user on before_user.user_id = i.before_user_id left join sys_user after_user on after_user.user_id = i.after_user_id left join sys_dept before_dept on before_dept.dept_id = i.before_dept_id left join sys_dept after_dept on after_dept.dept_id = i.after_dept_id left join asset_location before_location on before_location.location_id = i.before_location_id left join asset_location after_location on after_location.location_id = i.after_location_id where i.order_id = #{orderId} order by i.item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into asset_operate_order ( order_no, order_type, source_biz_type, source_biz_id, source_biz_no, order_status, biz_date, apply_user_id, apply_dept_id, approve_user_id, approve_time, approve_result, from_dept_id, to_dept_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, from_location_id, to_location_id, expected_return_date, disposal_reason, disposal_amount, attachment_count, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{sourceBizType}, #{sourceBizId}, #{sourceBizNo}, #{orderStatus}, #{bizDate}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyDeptId}, #{approveUserId}, #{approveTime}, #{approveResult}, #{fromDeptId}, #{toDeptId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{fromLocationId}, #{toLocationId}, #{expectedReturnDate}, #{disposalReason}, #{disposalAmount}, #{attachmentCount}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update asset_operate_order set attachment_count = #{attachmentCount}, update_time = sysdate() where order_id = #{orderId}

update asset_operate_order set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where order_id in
#{orderId}
